scripts.build: npm run build -w @recipe-app/shared && npm run build -w @recipe-app/db && npm run build -w @recipe-app/web && npm run build -w @recipe-app/api
scripts.test: npm run test -w @recipe-app/web && npm run test -w @recipe-app/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @recipe-app/shared && npm run typecheck -w @recipe-app/db && npm run typecheck -w @recipe-app/web && npm run typecheck -w @recipe-app/api
